title: Error attaching files to Jira issues
symptom: When attempting to attach email files to Jira issues, n8n throws an error: 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '0')'. This occurs specifically during the attachment step of the workflow.
applies_when: Using Jira node to add attachments
Processing email attachments with a Code node
root_cause: The error typically arises when the expected binary data structure is not correctly formed or passed to the Jira attachment node. If the binary data is undefined or not in the expected format, the node cannot access the required properties, leading to this error.
fix_steps: Ensure the Code node correctly processes and outputs the binary data from the email attachments.
Use an HTTP Request node to upload the files instead of the Jira attachment node.
agent_instruction: Check the binary data output from the Code node and consider using an HTTP Request node for file uploads.
